text.title: test-golden-master-legacy-rewrite Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for test-golden-master-legacy-rewrite as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Editing existing rows in the corpus when the rewrite changes output.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The corpus is the spec. Silent edits convert "rewrite parity check" into "rewrite is whatever the agent produced today" — the original goal is lost.

failure-mode.description: Letting the agent regenerate the corpus from its own rewrite ("update_expected=True").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Self-pinning produces a green test on day one and zero protection against day-two regressions; the corpus must be captured against the legacy, not the candidate.
